alerts.headline: High Wind Watch issued March 14 at 12:09PM EDT until March 17 at 6:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...South winds 20 to 30 mph with gusts up to 60 mph possible.
Strongest of the winds will be Monday night.

* WHERE...Eastern Massachusetts and Rhode Island.

* WHEN...From Monday afternoon through late Monday night.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds could blow down trees and power lines.
Power outages are possible. Travel could be difficult, especially
for high profile vehicles.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 30. West wind 8 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 43. Northeast wind 5 to 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Rain Showers Likely
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers likely after 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 36. Southeast wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers likely before 8am, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 59. Southeast wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 32 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 38. South wind 15 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 60 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 46. West wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 37 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 23. West wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 38. West wind 7 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 29. South wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly sunny, with a high near 43. South wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 32. South wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 48. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain. Partly cloudy, with a low around 32. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 45. Southwest wind around 13 mph.
